mapper.sql: id, store_id, name, status, type, starttime, endtime, isshow, is_delete
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM lkt_seconds_activity a RIGHT JOIN lkt_seconds_label lab ON lab.id = a.label_id AND lab.recovery = 0 RIGHT JOIN lkt_product_list b ON a.goodsId = b.id AND b.recycle = 0 RIGHT JOIN lkt_mch c ON b.mch_id = c.id LEFT JOIN lkt_brand_class d ON b.brand_id = d.brand_id LEFT JOIN lkt_product_class e ON substring_index(substring_index(b.product_class, '-', 2), '-', -1) = e.cid LEFT JOIN lkt_configure attr ON attr.id = a.attr_id
